ab: iraay ko cecay a kapot ako ci Kacaw halitawalay cingra a mihawikid to kalimaamaan.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kacaw，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kacaw, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: to pinanaman i, micaliw cingra to impic, sararop anca o tilid no kapot.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: kinacecay, kinatosa, kinatolo pacaliwan to no ’alomanay cingra to kalimaamaan.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: nikawrira iraay koya tati’ihay a pinangan ningra, mafana’ay a micaliw, mafokilay a patikol.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: saikor to i, cowa to kakahi a pacaliw ko ’alomanay i cingranan.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: yo cecay a romi’ad, mapolong kami a malacafay a misalama.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: i fatad no lalan, ka’enihay ci Kacaw, nikawrira matawal ningra ko sa’ilos.
ch: 路途中，Kacaw想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kacaw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: micaliw cingra to sa’ilos i kapokapotan, cowa kapihawikid kako han no ’alomanay cingra a pasowal.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn't bring them either.

ab: tangic sato ci Kacaw to caroh ningra. keter sa a somowal, “mana cowa kakahi kamo a pacaliw i takowanan to sa’ilos!”
ch: Kacaw急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Kacaw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don't everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: pakafana’ han no kapot cingra, cowa kapihawikid kiso to no miso, ya mipacaliwan i tisowanan a dafong i, cowa ho kapatikolen iso.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn't bring it yourself, and you wouldn't return the things lent to you!

ab: to roma sa to a romi’ad a mitilid, pacerem ci Kacaw a talapitilidan, ya micalwan ho ni Kacaw a dafong i, patikolen to ningra ko kapot.
ch: 隔天上學，Kacaw很早就到學校了，Kacaw把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kacaw arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: ta’ong han to ni Kacaw ko kapokapot a pasowal, ikor to haw i, mihawikid to cingra to no niyah to a dafong, miaray aca cingra to pipacaliw no kapot i cingraan i ’ayaw.
ch: Kacaw向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: kacaw apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
